description: During a recent system maintenance window, the automatic event detection pipeline produced false detections that were erroneously committed to the database alongside the real 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake. Clean the database by removing these false detections using standard seismological quality criteria (location plausibility, number of associated picks, and magnitude consistency) while preserving the legitimate earthquake record. Export a bulletin of the verified events to /home/ga/Desktop/verified_events.txt.
